messages.message:
Error: Cannot access refs during render

React refs are values that are not needed for rendering. Refs should only be accessed outside of render, such as in event handlers or effects. Accessing a ref value (the `current` property) during render can cause your component not to update as expected (https://react.dev/reference/react/useRef).

C:\Users\maximus\Desktop\intelligence dashboard\client\src\modules\maritime\MaritimePage.tsx:107:22
  105 |
  106 |     // Stable empty FeatureCollection — actual data pushed via setData() below
> 107 |     const EMPTY_FC = useRef({ type: 'FeatureCollection' as const, features: [] as never[] }).current;
      |                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot access ref value during render
  108 |
  109 |     // Push vessel GeoJSON directly to MapLibre at 2 Hz — bypasses React renders entirely.
  110 |     // Only rebuilds when dirty (new AIS data arrived); skips the tick otherwise.

Error: Cannot access refs during render

React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'vessel'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [vessel, vessel.lastUpdate]
